form.formComment: Recent form sound. Comes here off a 29-day let-up. Most recently 3rd of 8 at this track in G3 on March 12 over 1700m, 6 len behind Bay Nalcakan carrying 58kg at $5.35. The run before that won by 6 len at this track February 10 over 2000m defeating Unseen Power carrying 55kg at $1.65. No excuses today in this small field.

form.formComment: Puts an unbeaten record on the line. When well in the market on debut, favourite; came from midfield and won by 3 len at this track February 19 over 1600m defeating Sky Cruise carrying 58kg at $2.85. Last time out favourite; scored a big 4 len win at this track March 17 over 1400m defeating Lord Of Dragon with 58kg at $1.55. This race is well within his grasp.
